searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: The product or category keyword to search for (e.g. 'milk' or 'chips')

location.title: Delivery Location (Blinkit)
location.description: The exact delivery location string for Blinkit. Try to be as specific as possible (e.g. 'Connaught Place, New Delhi'). If empty, default is used.

maxItems.title: Max Items per Platform
maxItems.description: Maximum number of products to scrape from each platform
